summary: EXP-223 delivers a one-sentence targeted substring replacement in WIN-067 detail_evidence, resolving the c7/c8 carry-forward H1 (major) 1,430× vs 170× asymmetry. The closing sentence of the WGS84-tautology paragraph ('The formula that works is wholly WGS84; the formula that derives from dome geometry fails by 170×.') is rewritten as a 170–1,430× disambiguation that names each comparison type (170× = dimensionless-fractional lower bound, understates; 1,430× = apples-to-apples absolute-m/s² miss at Antarctic latitude) and points back to the opening paragraph for derivations. Verbatim c8 hole #1 recommendation option A plus a short gloss. Substring match is unique (verified 1 occurrence on 2026-04-22). No other fields touched; verdict 'Self-Contradicted' unchanged. Minor carry-forward items (c7/c8 hole #2 arithmetic precision slip, c6/c8 hole #3 Shepherd 2012 citation) remain scoped to separate future items per out_of_scope_deliberately.
